app.script:
local seconds = 0
function tick() if not state.running then return end
seconds = seconds + 1 local m = math.floor(seconds / 60) local s = seconds % 60 state.time = string.format("%02d:%02d", m, s) end
function start() state.running = true state.status = "Работает" end
function stop() state.running = false state.status = "Пауза" end
function reset() state.running = false seconds = 0 state.time = "00:00" state.status = "Остановлен" end
